title: Telegram Trigger session not registered
symptom: When sending a message to the Telegram trigger, n8n logs show 'The session “{id}” is not registered' and the trigger does not respond.
applies_when: Running n8n behind a reverse proxy
not_this_if: n8n is not behind a reverse proxy
root_cause: This error occurs when n8n is unable to properly handle websocket connections due to misconfiguration in the reverse proxy settings. Websocket support must be enabled for the Telegram trigger to function correctly.
fix_steps: Add the provided websocket configuration under the location block for n8n.
Ensure that the websocket location block is correctly set up.
Restart Nginx to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update your Nginx configuration to enable websocket support for n8n.
